findings.message: mod.ts has 24 non-export/non-comment lines — barrels must be export-only
mod.ts lacks section comment headers — recommended for navigability
exported function 'resetKv' uses non-standard prefix 'reset' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
type 'SharedKvConfig' uses non-standard suffix — convention is <Function>Options / <Noun>Spec
exported function 'maskRedisUrl' uses non-standard prefix 'mask' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'autoDetectProvider' uses non-standard prefix 'auto' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'keyToString' uses non-standard prefix 'key' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'generateVersionstamp' uses non-standard prefix 'generate' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'keyHasPrefix' uses non-standard prefix 'key' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'compareKeys' uses non-standard prefix 'compare' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'keyToRedisKey' uses non-standard prefix 'key' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'redisKeyToKey' uses non-standard prefix 'redis' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
README missing 11/12 mandated sections (Overview, Quickstart, Mental model, API, Recipes, Configuration, Testing, Observability, Architecture, Stability, Compatibility, License)
package owns runtime/adapters but does not import @netscript/telemetry — verify spans/metrics emitted
mod.ts does not export an `inspect<Noun>()` diagnostic — recommended discoverability axis
